calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Discharged

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Discharged

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION And Notice Of Motion For Default Money Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: William P. Lamb, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Timothy J. Kodani, Esq., and William E. Gilg, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs, Farrell Fleming and Katherine T. Tavasieff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Anjana V. Patel and Vikarm N. Patel.
Exparte Application for Order Amending Defendant's Name for Default Money Judgment in Civil Action is granted. The Court Orders that the default money judgment in this matter name the defendant as "Vikram M. Patel" instead of "Vikram N. Patel", as was incorrectly alleged in the complaint. The underlying complaint is also so amended.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Katherine T. Tavsieff sworn and examinded on her own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court Orders matter under submission this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Continued To Feb-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Continued To Oct-03-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
